calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
John Thomas, Special Assets Officer, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Underground Plumbing Service, Inc. or Elwyn D. Aldridge.
Defaults were entered against defendants on July 20, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 20, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Underground Plumbing Service, Inc. and Elwyn D. Aldridge as follows:

Damages/Principal - $57,115.41.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,691.80.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $465.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $62,772.21.

It is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment set forth in paragraph 3 of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-21-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Off Calendar
